title: POS printer offline
description: Store POS printer stopped responding during lunch peak.

comments.content: Cashier reports the printer stopped after the lunch rush started.

expectedSummary: Issue: The POS printer stopped responding during lunch peak. Current: the ticket is OPEN, unassigned, and the latest signal says the cashier reported the outage after rush started. Next: assign an operator and verify printer connectivity before deciding whether hardware replacement is needed.
